name: @mansoldev/framework
description: A modern CSS framework powered by Sass and PostCSS.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist', 'docs', 'temp'].forEach(path => fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build:website: pnpm exec astro build --root website && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve('website','dist'); const dest=path.resolve('docs'); fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.renameSync(src,dest);"
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:framework && pnpm run build:website
